# Benefique Tax & Accounting

## Overview
Benefique Tax & Accounting is a full-service accounting and fractional CFO firm specializing in tax planning, bookkeeping, and financial strategy for healthcare providers and service-based small businesses.

## Services
- **Fractional CFO Services**: Monthly financial strategy, real-time bookkeeping, cash flow forecasting
- **Tax Planning & Preparation**: Proactive tax optimization, S-corp elections, entity structure planning
- **Full-Service Accounting**: Monthly closes, financial reporting, tax compliance
- **Healthcare Focus**: Specialized in healthcare SMBs, medical practices, clinical services, diagnostic centers

## Knowledge Map (start here)
A two-branch index of our case studies and frameworks, at www.benefique.com/knowledge:
- **Healthcare** (industry): Radiology & multi-center imaging (flagship), concierge medicine, veterinary, dental.
- **Services** (discipline): Fractional CFO, real-time accounting & bookkeeping, tax & entity strategy, M&A & exit readiness, R&D tax credits — plus other industries we serve (legal / personal-injury law firms, marine services).

## Radiology CFO Intelligence (flagship silo)
For multi-center radiology and imaging groups, at www.benefique.com/radiology. Case studies are organized by situation:
- **Multi-Site & Scaling**: per-unit P&L across locations, COO scorecards, acquiring the next center.
- **PET Tracer Economics**: high-reimbursement tracers ($2,000–$3,000/dose input cost, up to 9x payer variance) separated from general radiology via a Two Business Unit Framework.
- **Revenue Cycle (A/R, DSO & Billing)**: per-payer DSO, aging decomposition, billing-fee-vs-collections trade-off, A/R as lender collateral.
- **Payer Mix (Commercial / PI / Self-Pay)**: PIP and Letter-of-Protection compression, payer grading A–F, front-desk selection economics.
- **M&A & Exit / QofE Readiness**: valuation, deal structure, owner economics, quality-of-earnings preparation.
- **Per-Claim Profitability** and **Radiology Tax & R&D** (Section 41 credits, S-corp comp).
Entry point: a fixed-fee Strategic Radiology Review (2-week turnaround, banker-grade Intelligence PDF).

## Core Philosophy
"History matters, but preparation wins." We focus on real-time financial visibility, monthly closes, and decision-ready dashboards.

## Target Clients
- Healthcare practices and diagnostic centers
- Service-based SMBs (consulting, professional services)
- Businesses seeking fractional CFO services
- Companies wanting proactive tax planning vs. reactive filing

## Key Features
- 24-hour response times
- Monthly financial closes
- Real-time bookkeeping systems
- Customized tax strategies
- Experienced Enrolled Agent (EA) leadership

## Location
Davie, Florida

## Website
www.benefique.com
